steps.title: Find the central claim
steps.content: The text says researchers found 41 smaller settlements around Izapa and concluded that they were culturally linked to it. The evidence is that the settlements are the same age and have the same pyramid-and-plaza arrangement, suggesting shared cultural ceremonies with residents of Izapa as the reason for the inference and cultural connection.

steps.title: Rule out distortions
steps.content: A reverses the relationship by saying Izapa's layout was based on the smaller settlements. B invents a comparison about the importance of ceremonies at Izapa versus the surrounding settlements. C focuses on recent discovery rather than the cultural-link inference and its construction evidence. The answer is D.
